title: Renovation Page registered generation, deterministic previews, and linked Activity
prompt: Create a renovation design delivery Page. Select and inspect the registered Page template before delegating Page creation, pass its exact implementation and the redacted user floor plan to the interior-design generator, run deterministic checks without browser self-acceptance, leave visual acceptance to the user, keep internal links relative, use shareUrl only for explicit sharing, and create a Page Activity that targets the returned pageId.
commands: node skills/interior-design/scripts/cli.mjs page --template interior-design-delivery --source-plan <redacted-user-floor-plan> --input normalized-model.json --output page --json

pa-cli pages publish --file page/index.html --folder renovation-delivery --template interior-design-delivery --title "Renovation delivery" --summary "Interactive renovation design delivery" --overwrite --json

personal-agent activity upsert --capability <ephemeral> --type page --title "Renovation design published" --detail "The renovation delivery Page is ready to open." --target-type page --target-id "<pageId returned by pa-cli pages publish>" --idempotency-key "page:renovation-delivery:published" --correlation-key "page:renovation-delivery" --json

artifacts.label: Page template provenance, generated thumbnail, and Activity target expectation
